summary: v0.3 increment with a verification/optimization loop: berry regrowth (90s, persisted), dynamic population 1-8 (dawn food + coherence gates, population-scaled food need), daytime storm event mitigated by roof coverage over the hall, lanterns as the ore sink (Town Hall crafting, hotbar 5), and UX polish (cursor mining progress, live threat warning, save hint). Loop: smoke suite caught a design flaw (storm exposure keyed on shelter_score which ground fill saturates -> rekeyed to roof_coverage); an independent subagent diff review returned 9 findings (HUD overflow, stale threat count, storm re-roll on old saves, save version bump, roof scan cap, 4 smoke coverage gaps), all applied; final suite 47/47 headless and windowed with reviewed screenshot.
scope: The five v0.3 features recommended in the prior handoff; 'must not build yet' list untouched.
next_action: Operator playthrough (storm with/without roof, grow to 8 settlers), then v0.4 scoping.
